sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>

# Let me verify current rotation and try rotating to 12 CW (5 more CW rotations)
# Current is 7 CW, need 5 more to reach 12 CW
# Let me first verify the current state
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
positions = [
    (20, 14), (20, 20), (20, 26), (20, 32), (20, 38), (20, 44), (20, 50),
    (27, 50), (33, 50), (39, 50), (45, 50), (45, 44), (45, 38), (45, 32),
    (45, 26), (45, 20), (45, 14), (39, 14), (33, 14), (27, 14),
]
current_colors = [ascii_lines[r][c] for r, c in positions]
print("Current:", current_colors)

initial_colors = ['w', 'g', 'S', 'b', 'p', 'Y', 'g', 'p', 'b', 'S', 'g', 'p', 'S', 'b', 'b', 'w', 'w', 'g', 'p', 'S']
def cw_rotate(colors, n):
    return [colors[(i - n) % 20] for i in range(20)]

# Verify current is 7 CW
expected_7 = cw_rotate(initial_colors, 7)
print("Expected 7 CW:", expected_7)
print("Match:", current_colors == expected_7)

# Try 5 more green clicks to reach 12 CW
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 32, 'col': 58} for _ in range(5)])
print("Result:", result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
